node.constraint: Initialize better-sqlite3 database 'shop.db'. Create a 'users' table (columns: id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, email TEXT UNIQUE, password TEXT) if not exists. Implement a POST handler: if body contains action 'register', insert the user into database. If action 'login', select user, verify password, set a cookie named 'user_session' with the email value (acting as session identifier), and return success.

Create a login and registration page at app/login/page.tsx (Amazon classic sign-in design). Display a card containing forms for both Sign-In and Create Account. Make POST requests to '/api/auth' with action 'login' or 'register' on submit. On success, store user state, set session cookies, and redirect to products catalog page at '/products'.
